blocks.text: Commencing with financial year 2018/19, METRO has been applying IFRS 15 (Revenue from
Contracts with Customers). The sales revenues reported for the current financial year relate
exclusively to revenues from contracts with customers.
Sales revenues are allocated to the following categories:
Gains from the disposal of fixed assets and gains from the reversal of impairment losses 145 360
Rents incl. reimbursements of subsidiary rental costs 268 236
N O T E S N O T E S T O T H E I N C O M E S TA T E M E N T 200
M E T R O A N N U A L R E P O R T 2 0 1 8 / 1 9
